Container.Name: BlogPusher
Container.Overview: Self-hosted blog publishing server for Hugo + GitHub Pages sites. Draft posts with Claude on mobile, send via HTTP Shortcuts, and BlogPusher pushes them directly to your GitHub repo via the API — no git CLI required. Includes a web UI for publishing, managing, and setting up new blogs.
Container.Description: Self-hosted blog publishing server for Hugo + GitHub Pages sites. Draft posts with Claude on mobile, send via HTTP Shortcuts, and BlogPusher pushes them directly to your GitHub repo via the API — no git CLI required. Includes a web UI for publishing, managing, and setting up new blogs.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the BlogPusher web interface. Change this if running multiple instances.

Config.Name: Config File
Config.Description: Full path to your config.yaml file. Create it from the example at github.com/emenblade/blogpusher — needs github_token, github_repo, github_branch, site_url.
